_comment: HarnessV2 intake stage hook manifest. install pipeline reads this and materializes the corresponding .claude/hooks/intake/<script>.py files plus a hooks section in .claude/settings.json. Each entry maps a Claude Code hook event to one of the Python scripts shipped alongside this file.

hooks.purpose: Block runtime YAML edits when not on a mission branch (enforces git-prepare-before-runtime-write HARD-GATE).
Block mission-contract writes outside the intake stage worktree (enforces stage-worktree-required HARD-GATE).
Block harness gate/contract advance when contract.yaml has pending_reviewer_recheck=true (enforces no-skip-recheck-after-fix HARD-GATE).
Set contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after mission-contract edit so the pre-advance check fires.
Append a structured trace event when the AI reads project-context.md.
